name: Wamesit Lanes - Family Entertainment Center ( Bowling & Arcade Game Rooms )
about: Wamesit Lanes is a multi-sport entertainment venue featuring indoor golf simulators alongside bowling lanes and an arcade. The golf section, known as The Links, offers five state-of-the-art simulators with access to over 90 courses and multiple game modes, suitable for both practice and tournaments. The venue operates on a mixed pricing model with hourly bay rentals and special packages for groups and events, complemented by a full-service restaurant and bar, Firewater Tavern, which serves food and cocktails. The facility is designed to cater to a wide range of patrons, from casual groups to corporate teams, with amenities including a patio, event spaces for up to 500 guests, and weekly entertainment like live music and watch parties.
why_golfers_like_it: Private bar and lounge access for groups
Support for challenges, tournaments, and events
Variety of game modes for different skill levels
Luxury facility with a high-end sports bar atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant with a range of dishes available at Firewater Tavern
Signature cocktails and full bar service available at Firewater Tavern

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has its own restaurant and bar, Firewater Tavern, which serves food and cocktails. BYOB policies are not explicitly mentioned, so it's best to confirm with the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the approximate time for playing 18 holes. You may need to contact the venue directly for this information.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Wamesit Lanes is kid-friendly, offering birthday parties, arcade games, and family-oriented events. It also has options for kids' parties and group outings.
